env HOME=${WORK}

[linux] env XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${HOME}/runtime

mkdir ${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR}

dex -log debug -lines &dex&
sleep 1s

kill -INT dex
wait dex

[linux] stderr ${WORK@R}'/\.config/dex/kernel\.json'
[darwin] stderr ${WORK@R}'/Library/Application Support/dex/kernel\.json'

-- .config/dex/kernel.json --
{"kernel":{"device":[],"network":"unix"}}
-- Library/Application Support/dex/kernel.json --
{"kernel":{"device":[],"network":"unix"}}
